'''Merrick and Kalb Industries''' was the biggest mining corporation in the [[Expanse]] region of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Headquartered in the province of [[House Reena/Legends|House Reena]], it was MKI that brought about Imperial involvement in the sector, unbeknownst to most of the sector's citizens and nobles.
